title: GiftGuard
problem_or_desire: Losing track of birthdays, anniversary-gift history, and social relationship nuances
core_concept: Categorized notification system organized strictly by social relationship tiers
proposed_approach: Systemic reminder sequences filtered by proximity thresholds
prototype_scope: Personal profile vault holding name, key date, gift category tags, and past interaction dates for 5 dummy contacts

title: AI Coffee Palette Auditor
problem_or_desire: Mismatch between generic inventory bean selection and local customer latent flavour preference data
core_concept: Optimizing coffee inventory based on actual customer preference data.
proposed_approach: A service that uses simple QR-code surveys at the point of sale to gather customer flavor preferences and adjust inventory accordingly.
prototype_scope: A 1-month pilot in one co-working space using QR codes to survey coffee preferences. | Set up QR codes at one coffee station.; Collect survey data for 30 days.; Analyze data to recommend inventory changes.

title: Corporate Wellness Vending
problem_or_desire: Employees struggle to find healthy snacks that align with their fitness goals.
core_concept: Smart vending machines that sync with employee fitness trackers to suggest snacks based on activity levels.
proposed_approach: Develop a machine that recognizes users via app and recommends snacks based on caloric needs.
prototype_scope: One machine in a single office building with 50 opt-in users.

title: Arboretum Architect
target_user: Urban professionals feeling disconnected from nature
problem_or_desire: Lack of calming mental stimulation during public transit commutes
core_concept: Slow-paced horticultural design where trees grow in real-time synchronization with sunlight exposure in the player's zip code.
proposed_approach: Integrate local meteorological and astronomical APIs to dictate plant growth patterns, incentivizing small adjustments to virtual plots throughout the day.
prototype_scope: Single desert garden biome where user can plant one cactus and observe sun-path light-tracking simulations over a 48-hour period.

title: Dynamic Menu Pricing
problem_or_desire: Food waste due to unpredictable demand and menu pricing rigidity.
core_concept: Software that adjusts menu prices in real-time based on inventory levels and time of day.
proposed_approach: Integrate with existing POS systems to offer digital menu boards that update prices automatically.
prototype_scope: A software plugin for one local cafe to test price fluctuations on three high-waste items.

title: SEO Decay Alert System
problem_or_desire: Losing existing traffic revenue to un-indexed updates in Google search result pages
core_concept: Threshold alerts for SEO rank fluctuations.
proposed_approach: A monitoring service that alerts content creators when specific pages experience significant rank drops, prompting manual review.
prototype_scope: A simple script or manual check that emails users when rank drops below a threshold. | Set up rank tracking for 5 sites.; Define alert thresholds.; Send manual alerts for 30 days.; Gather feedback on utility.

title: Vendor Dispute Navigator
problem_or_desire: Reconciling billing discrepancies with disparate cloud service vendors.
core_concept: An agent that autonomously cross-references service usage logs against line-item invoices.
proposed_approach: The agent extracts data from emailed invoices and uses API-accessible usage reports to flag potential overcharges for human review.
prototype_scope: Support for exactly three major SaaS billing platforms processing synthetic email data.

title: Local Lore Collector
problem_or_desire: Wanting to discover hidden local stories rather than tourist traps
core_concept: A location-based game where players 'capture' local legends by visiting specific, non-commercial landmarks
proposed_approach: Crowdsourced database of local folklore tied to specific geofenced coordinates
prototype_scope: A map interface showing three 'legend' pins that unlock text stories when the user is within 50 meters

title: SyncMyBoard
problem_or_desire: Mismatching players, times, and learning difficulty levels
core_concept: Profile matchmaking system optimized solely for complexity class requirements of game libraries
proposed_approach: Constraint matching where hosting users define acceptable game type metrics versus guest expertise filters
prototype_scope: Match creation form allowing search results filter based on complexity level and participant timezone matches

title: Brand Integrity Monitoring
target_user: Service providers with paid media ads
problem_or_desire: Brand advertising displaying alongside unsuitable or scammy link farms
core_concept: Monthly reporting on ad placements on low-reputation sites.
proposed_approach: A service providing monthly reports to store owners identifying where their ads are appearing on low-reputation sites.
prototype_scope: Manual monthly report generation for 5 clients. | Identify 5 clients.; Perform manual placement audits.; Deliver monthly reports.; Gather feedback.
